# PropAI

PropAI reads live WhatsApp broker group conversations to build structured,
verified property listings — and routes every enquiry directly to the broker
who posted it. Listings are fresh by design: they update daily and stale data
is auto-hidden after 30 days.

## What PropAI is
- A search layer over WhatsApp broker networks, not a portal that scrapes static listings.
- Covers Indian residential real estate: localities, buildings, BHK types, prices, and broker activity.
- Every listing includes a direct WhatsApp-routed enquiry to the posting broker — no forms, no spam, no chatbots.

## How to use this site
- /localities — browse all tracked localities, each with live listing counts.
- /localities/[slug] — a locality page with live listings, price ranges, and a map of geocoded buildings.
- /buildings — browse buildings tracked by PropAI.
- /about — how PropAI works and why freshness matters.

## Why listings have no photos
PropAI's listings are extracted from live WhatsApp broker group conversations, not
manually uploaded. Inventory changes daily — units get booked, prices shift,
availability closes — so static photos would misrepresent current state faster
than they'd help. Every listing includes a direct WhatsApp-routed enquiry to the
broker who posted it; photos, videos, and floor plans are available on request
through that conversation, not pre-loaded on the page.

## Trust & freshness
- Listings are sourced from real broker conversations, not portals.
- Data freshness is a first-class feature: stale listings are hidden automatically.
- Broker contact is handled over WhatsApp, so buyers talk to a real person, not a form.
